parameters.description: Name of your action queue

name: ResumeActionQueue
description: Resume action queue, optionally clear all pending actions before resume

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of your action queue

parameters.name: clear
parameters.description:
- `true`{lang=cs} - Clear still pending actions in queue before resume
- `false`{lang=cs} - Do not clear pending actions in queue

title: ResumeAllActionQueues
name: ResumeAllActionQueues
description: Resume all paused queues, optionally clear all pending actions before resume

parameters.name: clear
parameters.description:
- `true`{lang=cs} - Clear still pending actions in the paused queues before resume
- `false`{lang=cs} - Do not clear pending actions in paused queues

Check if an action exist by name

title: RunActionById
name: RunActionById
description:
Run an action, by id

Returns a boolean indicating whether the operation was successful.

parameters.name: runImmediately
parameters.description:
- `true`  - Will run the action as part of the current action, like a subaction
- `false` - Will run the action in it's own set queue. Code will continue without waiting

title: RunAction
name: RunAction
description: Execute another Streamer.bot action
summary:
Run an action, by name

Returns a boolean indicating whether the operation was successful.

parameters.name: runImmediately
parameters.description: Whether to run the action immediately, inline with the current action, or in it's own queue

options.description: Will run the action as part of the current action, like a sub-action
Will run the action in it's own set queue. Code will continue without waiting

title: SendAction
name: SendAction
description: Sends an Action from either the Twitch Broadcaster or Twitch Bot Account (denoted by *Italics* in Twitch chat)

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Enter the name of the Action exactly as it appears in Streamer.bot

parameters.name: bot
parameters.description:
- `true`{lang=cs} - Send the Action using your **Twitch Bot** account
- `false`{lang=cs} - Send the Action using your **Twitch Broadcaster** account

parameters.name: fallback
parameters.description:
- `true`{lang=cs} - (If `bot` bool is set to `True`), this is the same behaviour as if you had Bot as your preferred account.
- `false`{lang=cs} - (If `bot` bool is set to `True`), it will try to send using **only** the Bot account, and do **nothing** if it can't (i.e, not logged in).

title: IncrementAllKickUsersVarById
name: IncrementAllKickUsersVarById
description: Increments the values of Kick user variables for a list of user IDs.

parameters.name: userIds
parameters.description:
List of user IDs to increment the variable for. If a user ID does not exist, it will be ignored.
Example: `["123456789", "987654321"]`

parameters.name: varName
parameters.description: Name of the user variable

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value of how much the user variables should be incremented by

parameters.name: persisted
parameters.description:
- `true` - Persisted user variables will be affected
- `false` - Non-persisted user variable will be affected

- `false` - Non-persisted user variable will be affected

List of user IDs to increment the variable for. If a user ID does not exist, it will be ignored.
Example: `["123456789", "987654321"]`

parameters.name: varName
parameters.description: Name of the user variable

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value of how much the user variables should be incremented by

parameters.name: persisted
parameters.description:
- `true` - Persisted user variables will be affected
- `false` - Non-persisted user variable will be affected

- `false` - Will set the current amount of max redeems to the value of `redeems` parameter

parameters.name: redeems

parameters.name: additive

- `false` - Will set the current amount of max redeems per user to the value of `redeems` parameter

title: SendMessage
name: SendMessage
description: Sends a Twitch chat message using either Twitch Broadcaster or Twitch Bot account

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Enter the message contents

parameters.name: useBot
parameters.description:
- `true`{lang=cs} - Send the message using your **Twitch Bot** account
- `false`{lang=cs} - Send the message using your **Twitch Broadcaster** account

parameters.name: fallback
parameters.description:
- `true`{lang=cs} - (If `bot` bool is set to `True`), this is the same behaviour as if you had Bot as your preferred account.
- `false`{lang=cs} - (If `bot` bool is set to `True`), it will try to send using **only** the Bot account, and do **nothing** if it can't (i.e, not logged in).

title: SendWhisper
name: SendWhisper
description:
Send a Twitch Whipser to another user.

There are Twich limitations you have to consider before using this method:
- The user sending the whisper must have a verified phone number.
- The API may silently drop whispers that it suspects of violating Twitch policies.
- Rate Limits: You may whisper to a maximum of 40 unique recipients per day. Within the per day limit, you may whisper a maximum of 3 whispers per second and a maximum of 100 whispers per minute.

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: Login name of the user you want to send a whisper to

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Enter the message contents

parameters.name: bot
parameters.description:
- `true`{lang=cs} - Send the message using your **Twitch Bot** account
- `false`{lang=cs} - Send the message using your **Twitch Broadcaster** account

title: TwitchAnnounce
name: TwitchAnnounce
description: Sends a Twitch chat message using either Twitch Broadcaster or Twitch Bot account

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Enter the message contents

parameters.name: useBot
parameters.description:
- `true`{lang=cs} - Send the message using your **Twitch Bot** account
- `false`{lang=cs} - Send the message using your **Twitch Broadcaster** account

parameters.name: color
parameters.description:
Select the color for the announcement. Valid values are:
- `default` – Standard color
- `blue`
- `green`
- `orange`
- `purple`

parameters.name: fallback
parameters.description:
- `true`{lang=cs} - (If `bot` bool is set to `True`), this is the same behaviour as if you had Bot as your preferred account.
- `false`{lang=cs} - (If `bot` bool is set to `True`), it will try to send using **only** the Bot account, and do **nothing** if it can't (i.e, not logged in).

name: TwitchClearChatMessages

parameters.description: Enter the message contents

parameters.name: replyId
parameters.description: Enter the unique ID of the message to reply to

parameters.name: useBot
parameters.description:
- `true`{lang=cs} - Send the reply using your **Twitch Bot** account
- `false`{lang=cs} - Send the reply using your **Twitch Broadcaster** account

parameters.name: fallback
parameters.description:
- `true`{lang=cs} - (If `bot` bool is set to `True`), this is the same behaviour as if you had Bot as your preferred account.
- `false`{lang=cs} - (If `bot` bool is set to `True`), it will try to send using **only** the Bot account, and do **nothing** if it can't (i.e, not logged in).

title: TwitchSendAndPinMessage
name: TwitchSendAndPinMessage
description: Send a chat message and automatically pin it for 20 minutes

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The message to send to chat and pin

title: TwitchUnpinMessage
name: TwitchUnpinMessage
description: Unpin the pinned chat message

title: TwitchUpdatePinnedMessageDuration
name: TwitchUpdatePinnedMessageDuration
description: Update the duration of a pinned chat message

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description:
The duration to pin the chat message for.
- `null` for the pin to last till the end of the stream
- between `30` and `1800` - duration in seconds

title: CreateClip
name: CreateClip
description: Create a Twitch Clip

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: If `null`, will match the stream title at the time of creation.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Clip duration in seconds (min. 5, max 60).

title: CreateStreamMarker
name: CreateStreamMarker
description: Create a Stream Marker on Twitch

title: GetAllClips
name: GetAllClips
description: Fetch all clips for the connected Twitch Broadcaster. The list is in descending order by view count.
summary:
Clip data is always sorted by view count (descending) due to Twitch API limitations

A maximum of 1,000 clips can be returned

If a variable does not exist for a user, a new one is created.

parameters.description: Value of how much the user variables should be increased by

parameters.name: persisted
parameters.description:
- `true` - Persisted user variables will be affected
- `false` - Non-persisted user variable will be affected
